creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text:
I confirm the issue (Qt5 programs not following system font settings anymore since the update to LXQt 2.0.0) and that the update to lxqt-qtplugin 1.4.1 fixes it.

Please commit the update and backport it to 2024Q3, so that LXQt users tracking quarterly aren't stuck with broken theming for months. Thanks!
